para_trans: Officers of the Indian Forest Service
To be promoted / transferred
About the position.
Government of Maharashtra
Revenue and Forest Department
GOVERNMENT ORDER NO. AFO-1026 / P.No. 01 / Forest-07,
Madam Cama Marg, Martyr Rajguru Chowk,
Mantralaya, Mumbai - 400 032.
Date: April 6, 2026
Read: - 1. GOVERNMENT ORDER NO. AFO-1025 / Q.No. 07 / Forest-07, D. 10.03.2026
The Government Order:
Read No. 1 here. By Government Order dated 10.03.2026, Dr. Ravikiran Govekar,
Bhave has been transferred from the post of Additional Principal Chief Conservator of Forests (MoEF) to that of Additional Principal Chief Conservator of Forests.
The post has been posted at (Kandlavan Room), Mumbai. Dr. Jitendra S. Ramgaonkar,
Bhave has been transferred from the post of Chief Conservator of Forests (Wildlife) West, Mumbai to that of Chief Conservator of Forests (Mantralaya).
The post has been given at Revenue & Forest Department, Mantralaya, Mumbai.
2. However, in the said Government Order, Paragraph No. In 2, Dr. Ravikiran Govekar and Dr.
Jitendra Ramgaonkar shall continue to hold the present office until further orders of the Government.
V. Rama Rao was to retain the additional charge of the Kandalvan cell until further orders.
has been mentioned.
3. Now Shri S.V. Rama Rao has been relieved of the additional charge of Kandalvan cell.
Dr. Ravikiran Govekar, Bhavse has been posted as Additional Principal Chief Conservator of Forests (Candle Forest Cell), Mumbai.
Additional Principal Chief Conservator of Forests (Mantralaya) is being relieved to join.
Dr. Jitendra S. Ramgaonkar appointed as the Chief Conservator of Forests (MoF) by Dr. Ravikiran Govekar.
Take charge of the position. In addition to this regular post, the Chief Conservator of Forests (Wildlife) West,
The additional charge of the post of Mumbai shall be held by the following order.
This Government Order is available on the Government of Maharashtra website www.maharashtra.gov.in.
